rationale: All four words are present with correct text, correct hierarchy (NOTHING larger, rendered in the brief's yellow on the near-black background), and they build in reading order before a hold and a full exit by the final frame. However, the filmstrip shows roughly the first two tiles (~1s) completely black before SHIP appears, dead air the brief does not call for, and the exit reads as a hard cut between adjacent tiles with no mid-flight horizontal motion captured; the overshoot pop and the NOTHING pulse are not evidenced in the four visually identical hold tiles. The block is optically centered with consistent line spacing and nothing clipped, though partial states sit top-heavy in the frame. Typography is clean and high-contrast but default-feeling; overall it needs one timing/motion revision pass.
